reference: I have a resting heart rate in the 40s, and at times it starts racing for short periods. I also suffer from migraines, and I know I have an arachnoid cyst in my brain. I had a large cyst in my left lung that necessitated the removal of the entire left lower lobe three years ago at Cedars-Sinai Hospital in Los Angeles. I am a twenty-four-year-old female and starting my career as a videographer in Nashville, but over the past week, I have barely been able to work due to extreme fatigue, headaches, and a low heart rate in the 40s. Do you think it's possible that all these symptoms are related?
